college_info.college_name: Kakinada Institute of Technological Sciences: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Kakinada Institute of Technological Sciences admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Kakinada Institute of Technological Sciences for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Kakinada Institute of Technological Sciences has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
B.Pharma Candidates should have completed 16 years of age by the date of commencement of admission or on such other date as may be notified by the CET committee. There is no upper age limit.
After 10th Diploma Candidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.

A:    Kakinada Institute of Technological Sciences has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Pharma, After 1th Diploma which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Medicine & Health Sciences. Kakinada Institute of Technological Sciences has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Mining Engineering, Pharmaceutical engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Mining Engineering, Structural Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: As stated above, YGI provides a good campus infrastructure with excellent education and placement.

review_content.Placements: The college is under Kurukshetra University, Kurukshetra and recognised by AICTE India. The placement in the campus drive is mainly in the private companies related to the electrical, electronics, and mechanical engineering. Most of the companies visit the campus like Bajaj, Kotak Mahindra, Wipro etc., for the recruitment drive. Most of the pass out students are settled in these companies with good packages. All the details regarding the institute can be obtained from the official website http://www.yamuna.edu.in.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and satisfactory, and the campus is situated in the green paddy fields all around. The institute provides hostels for boys and girls separately with both A/C and non-A/C. There is also a staff quarter on the campus. The facilities like Wi-Fi, gym, playgrounds, support courts, etc., are available on the campus. There are well-facilitated A/C classrooms and labs for each branch of engineering, BDS MBA, nursing, diploma polytechnic, etc. There is a multi-specialist hospital on the campus named Ch. Lekhraj hospital. There are separate libraries for each section, i.e., engineering, business, etc. More than 100 chair vacancy central library with fully A/C facility is available on the campus. There are a canteen and other fast-food stalls on the campus. My first and last experience on the campus of YIET is much satisfied with the fee packages.

review_summary.college_name: Yamuna Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best college for CSE engineering.

content.Placements: The training and placement cell of the college is awesome. More than 20 MNCs visited the college every year for the intake of more than 300 students for the course of computer science and engineering. One of the most reputed companies visited are Tech Mahindra and HCL India Pvt Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is awesome. The whole college campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is three separate building in the college for engineering Diploma and nursing courses. The classrooms are well maintained. All basic facilities like medical and sports facilities are provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Placements were average, but the college would be better if placements are improved.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were not good. The college may lose its reputation if the placements remain the same. Placements will appear as exceptions in 2019. Placements for computer science were good, and poor for mechanical and average for electrical and civil departments.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college were average. Wi-Fi facility was average. Sports facilities were not good. Labs were very good. Hostel rooms were good. A canteen is present on the campus, and Paneer was the best choice in canteen. The academic building was not high-rated. Games were very good. Classrooms were good. The campus was good. I had a good experience at the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: not too much satisfied because of staff. But there should be great campus with full wifi .and fully

content.Placements: There should be no company for civil engineering. Coming in this college. Its a great draw back for this college. There is no placement cell for civil engineering. But other branches company should come in campus. They offer job for only 10k-15k. Various student go for job offers from company.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great. No one get this type of infrastructure in Haryana. AC classroom available great hostel facility available. A c facility also available in hostel. Canteen facility are also available inside the campus. Football basketball volleyball cricket facility should also available in this campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: As stated above, YGI provides a good campus infrastructure with excellent education and placement.

content.Placements: The college is under Kurukshetra University, Kurukshetra and recognised by AICTE India. The placement in the campus drive is mainly in the private companies related to the electrical, electronics, and mechanical engineering. Most of the companies visit the campus like Bajaj, Kotak Mahindra, Wipro etc., for the recruitment drive. Most of the pass out students are settled in these companies with good packages. All the details regarding the institute can be obtained from the official website http://www.yamuna.edu.in.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and satisfactory, and the campus is situated in the green paddy fields all around. The institute provides hostels for boys and girls separately with both A/C and non-A/C. There is also a staff quarter on the campus. The facilities like Wi-Fi, gym, playgrounds, support courts, etc., are available on the campus. There are well-facilitated A/C classrooms and labs for each branch of engineering, BDS MBA, nursing, diploma polytechnic, etc. There is a multi-specialist hospital on the campus named Ch. Lekhraj hospital. There are separate libraries for each section, i.e., engineering, business, etc. More than 100 chair vacancy central library with fully A/C facility is available on the campus. There are a canteen and other fast-food stalls on the campus. My first and last experience on the campus of YIET is much satisfied with the fee packages.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The behavior of? Staff is very bad. They were talking fake about their college for admission.

content.Placements: No placement for our batch and no placement for our seniors. Maximum very bad results of the college. I don't know about the salary what I think 50_60 k and teachers 30_35k. No company visited in campus. Yes there has placement cell. It is not efficient and useful from my side.
content.Infrastructure: No games no medical facilities no labs experiments quality of food is very poor also in canteen. Hostal room very dirty also bathroom and toilet. The infrastructure is very poor. Wi-Fi is not working regularly very poor condition of college also the classrooms is very dirty no AC working in them.

The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Yamuna Group of Institutions can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Yamuna Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 675608 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 675608.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.
In this section, students can find the Yamuna Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, as well as the cutoff for other courses and previous years, ie, 2024 and 2023.
For the General AI category, admissions closed at a rank of 675608 for B.E. / B.Tech. Candidates can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for other categories, rounds, courses and years.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for North India Institute of Technology (NIIT Najibabad) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: North India Institute of Technology (NIIT Najibabad) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Com. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Com. The fee structure for the North India Institute of Technology (NIIT Najibabad) programmes is around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel in our college had very good food. Facilities for digital classes were very good and the computer lab was huge. Approximately 400 computers were available in the lab. They provided a ground for basketball and cricket. Everything was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Training & placement department must be there to train students, and the faculty has to be trained.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good to have a separate building for all the departments and has well-maintained labs and library. They need to work on canteen and parking area for students. Overall, the infrastructure of the college is good and has food furniture and fixtures.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for local student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with Green campus and amazing design Lecturer Hall. Wi-Fi Transport, and Good Quality Food available in mess. The name of the canteen is NIIT canteen, Sports fest also conducted every year in college. College ground is green and there is a lot of area for cricket lover students.

reviews.review_heading: I had completed my study in 2017 and my experience was not good.
reviews.review_text: It's very bad experiences in my college it is very old type. A very bad classroom, even no water supply and washrooms only rural areas student have admitted in the college is affiliated to mahatma Jyoti Ba Phule rohilkhand university Bareilly and not good in my aspect.

reviews_list.review_title: MMANTC The Inside News.

review_content.Placements: Everyone I know from the past batch has either found placement on their own or hasn't gotten a placement. I don't think there were any placements organized by the college or, if there were, they were not made public, so the placement rate is actually poor here as far as I know.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good in the college and hostel, and the mess food is average. It isn't very bad or good, but the hostel has poor network coverage and no Wi-Fi is provided as of now.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching staff is good and supportive, but there aren't enough teaching staff after the 1st or 2nd year. Semester exams are kind of difficult, not so much, but the curriculum isn't very relevant now.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Not great for placements; look for a better college.

review_content.Placements: No students have been placed as of now. Everyone here had to find placements on their own off-campus, and there were no internship opportunities provided by the college. The campus placement cell is not functioning properly to support students' growth, aside from taking fees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is the worst. There is no serious effort towards development, and there are no faculty members for teaching in the computer department. Additionally, there is no freedom to work on creative or out-of-the-box projects.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and worthy to join.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 4.5 LPA and the lowest package was 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course were Tata, Birla Cement, and JK Cement. The top Roles offered in my course were draftsman, civil engineer, and Site Supervisor. About 30 percent of students got internships from my course and they got internships in Tata Birla cement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and Infrastructure is good facilities available are- Wi-Fi, Labs, Air conditioners, classrooms, big library. The quality of the hostel is very good and clean there are also medical facilities available. The canteen facility is also available and mess is also available with low cost on food.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Maulana Mukhtar Ahmad Nadvi Technical Campus B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 1.55 and 35.54, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Electronics & Communication, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 35.54. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile o

Maulana Mukhtar Ahmad Nadvi Technical Campus MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Electronics & Communication turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 35.54. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 27.15 in the General category under the HS quota.

reviews.review_heading: If you don't have any other option, then you will take admission, I say please don't take admission.
reviews.review_text: Some faculty members have the best and good that explain everything in detail and are awesome, but some faculty members who passed from here now teach. No network in college, have Wi-Fi, but it does not work properly. Labs are the best PC and everything. In the library, you have the best space.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms: Well-equipped lecture halls and seminar rooms with proper seating arrangements and audio-visual aids.
Laboratories: Specialized labs for Science, Engineering, and other disciplines with necessary equipment and safety protocols.
Departmental Offices: Faculty offices and research space within each department.

reviews.review_heading: MMANTC The Inside News.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good in the college and hostel, and the mess food is average. It isn't very bad or good, but the hostel has poor network coverage and no Wi-Fi is provided as of now.

reviews.review_heading: Not great for placements; look for a better college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is the worst. There is no serious effort towards development, and there are no faculty members for teaching in the computer department. Additionally, there is no freedom to work on creative or out-of-the-box projects.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and worthy to join.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and Infrastructure is good facilities available are- Wi-Fi, Labs, Air conditioners, classrooms, big library. The quality of the hostel is very good and clean there are also medical facilities available. The canteen facility is also available and mess is also available with low cost on food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty. Good projects handled by our batch.
reviews.review_text: Good management, college is placed in Malegaon, mess is available, best hostel ever, best infrastructure ever, very big campus, Wi-Fi, labs, library are present.  Good quality in food, and restaurants are nearly 100m away from campus and hostels, sports and games are available .

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maulana Mukhtar Ahmed Nadvi Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available on campus were computer labs, big classrooms with a good environment, a big library with lots of various books, magazines, and newspapers, and a big playground.

reviews.review_heading: If you have another option, go for it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good concerning Unipune standards. There is no Wi-Fi facility, and they say that the students will misuse it. Classrooms are big enough. There are no medical facilities. Labs have mechanisms that work sometimes. We were in DOM lab for a practical, and the balancing apparatus stopped working.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely not worth of money, placements are rare phenomenon.
reviews.review_text: The library outdated, it's filled up only with old edition reference books of SPPU 2015 syllabus, and there's no system to request for new books, they are not updating the library, the contains of 5 computers,  2 for girls and 3 for boys, and only one of then have internet connection, as well the CPU is pretty old and it hang a lot; classrooms are okay, some of them have projectors, some of them do not, some of them have whiteboards while rest have chalk board; Majority of lab needs maintenance ...

faqs.answer: Miracle Educational Society Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course

review_summary.college_name: Miracle Educational Society Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is good. It has good faculty, well-equipped lab facilities, and placements.

content.Placements: Miracle Educational Society Group of Institutions MESGI, placement rates are variable, but for the 2023- 24 period, placement percentages were around 60% to 95% in most branches. The highest package offered is 3.2LPA, and the average package offered is 1.2LPA. Major recruiters include TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, IBM, Infosys, and Wipro. While specific internship data for each course is not available, internships are provided through its associated company. Miracle Software Systems is offering a stipend to students for hands on experience.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the lab facilities and infrastructure is good. The labs, classrooms, and library are well maintained. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college, but not in the hostel. In the hostel, the morning and night food is good, but the afternoon food is good only on some days. The canteen and sports facilities in the college are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is good. It has good faculty members and well-equipped lab facilities.

content.Placements: In our college, the placement percentage is around 75%. The highest salary package is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 1.5 LPA. Top companies like DRDO, ISRO, etc., visit our college. From our course, around 50% of students got placements.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the lab facilities and infrastructure are good. Labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college but not in the hostel. In the hostel, the morning and night food is good. But the afternoon food is good only on some days. The canteen and sports facilities at the college are also good.

hostel_campus.college_name: Miracle Educational Society Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good. It has good faculty, well-equipped lab facilities, and placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the lab facilities and infrastructure is good. The labs, classrooms, and library are well maintained. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college, but not in the hostel. In the hostel, the morning and night food is good, but the afternoon food is good only on some days. The canteen and sports facilities in the college are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good. It has good faculty members and well-equipped lab facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the lab facilities and infrastructure are good. Labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college but not in the hostel. In the hostel, the morning and night food is good. But the afternoon food is good only on some days. The canteen and sports facilities at the college are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good reputation. I suggest not to depend on faculty members, learn yourself.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel facilities are good, and mess is excellent. Our department has Wi-Fi, labs, and library facilities. There is no ragging in the hostel. Our seniors are also friendly with us. There is a sick and basic hospitality in our college. Canteen prices are a little bit high.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course depends on the university regulation and the university will give course structure. Facilities of the college are good and the department is very good with good faculty members and their response is very good. The college canteen is maintained with the quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is very good. Labs are well-maintained, neat, and clean, with high-speed internet available. We have a big library that contains a vast number of books. Additionally, we have a digital library equipped with high-speed internet.

reviews.review_heading: There are good and experienced faculty for teaching.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure has a good and pleasant environment without any disturbances. A vast number of books are available at my college. Hostel facilities are good. They maintain some rules for all students. The food is also very hygienic. They provide a ground for playing games.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure but it slightly improved the inter-way of teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in Miracle Educational Society is very beautiful and very large. There is a central library in our college which helps all students gain knowledge and self-development for the occasion of placements in top companies. In the hostel, there are 3-sharing rooms. It has hygienic mess facilities which help all students to live peacefully and happily.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college for this fee.
reviews.review_text:
The college is pretty huge and has a big playground along with library facilities, classrooms, and all department labs. 
WiFi is also available at computer labs. 
Hostel facilities are satisfactory, with good mess food and also hygienic canteen food available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is an underrated gem.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good and unique from others. The facilities like washrooms, library, drinking water, medical room are available in every department. Labs are facilitated with Wi-Fi and good air conditioning. The residential facilities are not so bad at our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very nice to study as well to enjoy a lot also. B. Teach life is also the best life.
reviews.review_text: For each department, there will be Wi-Fi availability, and our labs will be very good, which are also equipped with AC facilities. Classrooms are very nice, with big spaces and nice benches. The food was very nice, and the menu is also very good, which is very healthy for us. There is a lot of space available for playing games, and there is also a also a medical facility on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: College is okay for degree.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure in my college, there are more facilities in labs, and the library has many books, even out-of-course books. There is also good maintenance in hostel rooms and mess, as well as classrooms. But the food here is not as good as expected.

reviews.review_heading: My college was a good one, as everything was available there, like the best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, the infrastructure at our college is very good. We have vast classrooms and a library. Our campus provides wi-fi and broadband connections throughout the campus. Our library is very vast and we have a digital library as well. Our hostel is non AC and we have common washrooms. The food was not so good and not so bad either. We have a lot of games and sports, indoors and outdoors. We have a vast field.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, gave very useful information. Good environment and a good campus with a good library
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the classroom, which is excellent with digital screens. The library is quiet and has all books available to study. Almost all sports ground construction is not completed yet. The mess food is not good here; please arrange food from somewhere else. The teachers are mostly assistant and associate professors, all well-defined.

reviews.review_heading: Having a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good campus. The labs are very good. The college has the best and most vast library, having more books for all subjects and also having a digital library. The hostel facility is good, and the food is also good. The college has grounds for playing games like volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our HOD's unit is the best in our college. Wi-Fi is available at our college. The infrastructure of our college is very good. The hostel does not provide good facilities. The boys' hostel will be closed before 8 p.m. We can play any indoor or outdoor game.

faqs.answer:
A:    Gyan Sagar College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together.
Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %.
Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks.
Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis.
OR
Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.

individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Placement in our college is quite poor with hardly any practical exposure given to any students. In my 2025 batch, only around 5 out of 60 students got placed and most of them were through off-campus efforts. The college lacks industry readiness.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the hostel facilities isn't good, they are the worst and come at the cost of your health. I also got jaundice while I was residing in the college so I would recommend anyone to stay away from that hostel plus the food is also not good for your health.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Value of money for OBC and SC, no fees are charged by college.

content.Placements: There are approximately 45 students in batch. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA and the highest is approximately 8 LPA. Companies like Bansal Construction looking forward to recruiting.
content.Infrastructure: All the basic needs of students are available like canteen, Wi-Fi, and big library. If I talk about playground, there is a good texture and cricket ground. If I talk about volleyball, there is a level ground. Mess facility is available if you want to have lunch at the value of money.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and highly qualified and always try to give their 100% in my branch. Students are struggling with ED in 1st semester because the most students belong to Hindi medium, so for the first time it is very difficult to catch every single words of English.

paragraphs: Gyan Sagar College of Engineering admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Gyan Sagar College of Engineering considers scores in JEE Main, MP BE, and MPPET for admission to specific courses.Gyan Sagar College of Engineeringoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 91,200 - 92,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 40,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel facilities isn't good, they are the worst and come at the cost of your health. I also got jaundice while I was residing in the college so I would recommend anyone to stay away from that hostel plus the food is also not good for your health.

reviews.review_heading: Value of money for OBC and SC, no fees are charged by college.
reviews.review_text: All the basic needs of students are available like canteen, Wi-Fi, and big library. If I talk about playground, there is a good texture and cricket ground. If I talk about volleyball, there is a level ground. Mess facility is available if you want to have lunch at the value of money.

reviews.review_heading: In 2024, placements were good in the college.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts excellent infrastructure with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, a spacious library, and state-of-the-art sports facilities. The campus is clean and lush green. Wi-Fi access is also available here for the students, and it is good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is below average .
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities available for students. They use their own smartphones to give internet to the laptop. The lab from this college is okayish, and the computer lab is also average. They use mini computers instead of standard computers, and they are bad.

reviews.review_heading: My College Gyan Sagar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college computer labs have the latest software and the latest version of Windows. The college laboratories also have the facility of high-speed internet connection. The library is also very big. The hostel facility with a mess is available for students who are from far away from the city, and the charges are affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfying campus and security.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my department are average. The campus is surrounded by greenery everywhere. The classrooms and labs are good with all the requirements. The food available in the mess and canteen is acceptable. Limited sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good but the faculty members should be more helpful.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very big and surrounded by greenery and mountains, which gives off the positive vibes of nature. The Wi-Fi facilities are only available for faculty members, but a well-stocked library is also present. The quality of food in the canteen is good and tasty, and there are multiple sports facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: My honest opinion on my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in my college provided for the students are really nice and helpful. Every student can avail of the labs, classrooms, and every facility of the college. The hostel facility is really nice for the students. Medical facility and sports facilities are provided for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied because of the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my department are good. The classrooms and labs are clean and comfortable. Wi-Fi facilities are only available for faculty members. A well-stocked library is present. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Sharing my college experience with you all.
reviews.review_text: There is a wide library, and students can easily get books from the library without interference. Hostels provide free water and electricity, and there are also Wi-Fi facilities provided to students. The quality of meals is very poor, as seen in registration, which is primarily done during the admissions process.

reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is surrounded by greenery everywhere and there are multiple sports grounds present on the campus. All the labs and classrooms are well-equipped and maintained. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very hygienic. Wi-Fi facilities are only for faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Collage has good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for my course are good. The classrooms are comfortable and clean. The labs are well-equipped with all the related resources. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very hygienic, and many varieties are present.

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are average size and the furniture is getting old and worn out. Technologies like projectors and computers are outdated. A well-stocked library is present. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good and many varieties of foods are present. Multiple sports grounds are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gyan Sagar College, Sagar, Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and every facility is available here, like Wi-Fi, labs, big classrooms and the biggest library. The facility of our hostel is also good; the food quality is not very good but okay. The sports field is also very big and good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gyan Sagar College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi is only available in the staff room. Labs are not spacious. The library is well-stocked with a new collection. Facilities in the hostel are limited. The mess and canteen food are not healthy. Medical facilities are not available. Games and sports are available, and there is a separate club for them.

The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa course fee ranges between INR 70,000 to 4,87,200.

faqs.answer: A:    Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa provides programmes including After 10th Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. college_info.college_name: SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science programmes is around INR 39,000 to 1,80,000.

faqs.answer: A:    SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant branch of Engineering/ Technology from an Institution recognized by AICTE and secured minimum 45% marks, or must have passed B.Sc. from a recognized university and secured minimum 45% marks and have passed 12th examination with mathematics as subject. Candidate should also be the domicile of Madhya Pradesh state.Executive MBA/PGDMCandidates appearing in the final examination of a Bachelor's Degree can also apply.BBACandidate must have passed 10+2 from recognized board.M.Sc.Candidate must have completed Bachelor's Degree under 10+2+3 Pattern in Biological Science/ Physical Science/ Agricultural Sciences/ Veterinary Sciences/ Fishery Sciences/ Engineering/ Technology/ Pharmacy Gradation/ MBBS/ BDS/ BPT with mentioned marks are eligible.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 from recognized board.MCACandidates should have recognized Bachelor's Degree (from an university recognized by the university grants commission) of minimum 3 years duration in BCA, B. Sc (IT/Computer Science) with Mathematics as a Subject at 10+2 level or at Graduate Level and should have obtained at least 50% at the qualifying Examination. Candidate should also be the domicile of Madhya Pradesh state.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has well-developed infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Only a few students got placements in every stream. Placements are not good in our college. Students got placed in small companies and some local firms with the lowest salary package of 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Students have to pay for placement training. Around 10-30% of students got placed in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good and well-developed infrastructure and facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi. All students and staff members can access Wi-Fi. Our college has a sports complex for students for playing and perform. There is a well-stocked library available in our college. It has many books which help students to prepare for competitive exams. Our college has a cafeteria which provides a variety of food items. Our college provides a gym to stay fit. Laboratories have all the required materials. Our college provides medical facilities which help in all kinds of emergencies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and the best faculty, but the transportation facilities are not good.

review_content.Placements: There are not good placements in our college, but a few companies come here. Some students get placed in local companies and small firms. They offered an average salary package of 3 LPA. Field projects and internships are conducted, but not by the college. Students have to reach out to companies to get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well developed. Many facilities are provided to students. There is a sports complex where many sports activities and competitions are held. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are hostel facilities. The mess food is good and hygienic. There are medical facilities for illnesses and injuries. There is a gymnasium for the fitness of students. Students can get additional knowledge from the well-stocked library. There is a cafeteria where we can have coffee with our friends. There are laboratories with all materials and equipments.

overview_faqs.question: Is SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science is a reputed institute for B.Tech, Executive MBA/PGDM, BBA, M.Sc., B.Sc., MCA, MBA/PGDM, BCA, B.Com, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Science, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science has a review rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.2 on campuslife, 2.2 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college from my perspective.

content.Placements: Talking about placement in Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science, placement is not provided by the college. You have to go outside to seek placement opportunities, like attending walk-in interviews, because the college doesn't assist with placements. Most importantly, the majority of students in the college are working individuals, so the college doesn't provide any placement assistance.
content.Infrastructure: No facilities are provided for the hostel. This means that from the college's side, no arrangements are made for accommodation, and you have to find outside accommodation such as rooms, paying guest accommodations, or hostels according to your comfort. Talking about the infrastructure of the college, it is very famous in Indore. The infrastructure of the college is good; it has a pool, a basketball complex, and a large playground area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are very bad of this college, no internship given to students.

content.Placements: In our college placement facilities are very poor. In our college very rare companies visit for campus selection. Feels are required for placement and internship opportunities. Students reach the companies out side from themselves for placement and internship. 10% students get placed in small firms, local companies. Average package offered 2LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good sports facilities, many sports competition and tournaments are organized by the college which helps to develop skills of students. Library with a lot of books, we can issue books with library card. Canteen facility are available where we enjoy tasty snacks and melodious tea. There is computer labs with good technology. Our classrooms are properly furnished with good benches and tables, light and fans, etc. Science labs is also available with good materials.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has well-developed infrastructure.

content.Placements: Only a few students got placements in every stream. Placements are not good in our college. Students got placed in small companies and some local firms with the lowest salary package of 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Students have to pay for placement training. Around 10-30% of students got placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good and well-developed infrastructure and facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi. All students and staff members can access Wi-Fi. Our college has a sports complex for students for playing and perform. There is a well-stocked library available in our college. It has many books which help students to prepare for competitive exams. Our college has a cafeteria which provides a variety of food items. Our college provides a gym to stay fit. Laboratories have all the required materials. Our college provides medical facilities which help in all kinds of emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and the best faculty, but the transportation facilities are not good.

content.Placements: There are not good placements in our college, but a few companies come here. Some students get placed in local companies and small firms. They offered an average salary package of 3 LPA. Field projects and internships are conducted, but not by the college. Students have to reach out to companies to get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well developed. Many facilities are provided to students. There is a sports complex where many sports activities and competitions are held. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are hostel facilities. The mess food is good and hygienic. There are medical facilities for illnesses and injuries. There is a gymnasium for the fitness of students. Students can get additional knowledge from the well-stocked library. There is a cafeteria where we can have coffee with our friends. There are laboratories with all materials and equipments.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the best infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered at our college. Our college charges fees for providing placements and internship training, but no placement opportunities are offered to students. Only a few students from all batches and streams are placed in local businesses. They offer a salary package of 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This college has a library where students can prepare for exams. There is a canteen where the food is acceptable and average. There are medical facilities for students. We also have well-equipped laboratories and a neat and clean hostel. There is a gym for fitness. Wi-Fi setups with full access are provided. There is a sports complex where students showcase their talents.

paragraphs: SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Science considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CAT for admission to specific courses.SIMS - Sanghvi Institute of Management and Scienceoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 15 months - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 52,500 - 1,35,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 39,000 - 1,80,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well developed. Many facilities are provided to students. There is a sports complex where many sports activities and competitions are held. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are hostel facilities. The mess food is good and hygienic. There are medical facilities for illnesses and injuries. There is a gymnasium for the fitness of students. Students can get additional knowledge from the well-stocked library. There is a cafeteria where we can have coffee with our ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: This college has a library where students can prepare for exams. There is a canteen where the food is acceptable and average. There are medical facilities for students. We also have well-equipped laboratories and a neat and clean hostel. There is a gym for fitness. Wi-Fi setups with full access are provided. There is a sports complex where students showcase their talents.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is great, and the faculty are good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good, but there is no regulation of classes. The facilities are great. The food quality is good. The library is at a great location on our campus. Wi-Fi is of good quality. Sports are good. The canteen is good, and the food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college with average teaching.
reviews.review_text: Good college with good infrastructure with well maintain labs and sports ground and cleanliness is also great but food facility is average. Events are also well maintained by students and teachers. About the hostel, I kindly inform that this college doesn't have any hostel facilities, so you have to prefer rooms nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Students looking for admission in this college must think twice as you can get a better college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms and labs are well maintained and well-equipped. There are a basketball court, cricket ground, table tennis room, badminton court and indoor games like carrom and chess. The library is good enough with a good seating capacity. The canteen is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good place to enjoy your college life.
reviews.review_text: The college prospectus states that Wi-Fi facility is provided, but we weren't given the facility. The infrastructure of classrooms was above average. There were no medical facilities. A football ground and basketball court are available and are of average quality.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Labs, classrooms, library, etc., are up to date. Hostels are not available on the campus but are available outside the campus. I didn't face any issues during my tenure in the college. I am not sure about the present situation. The library has all the essential study materials. One will not face any problem in getting books related to their course.

reviews.review_heading: If I have to give any review about my college, it is nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have separate academics, civil, mechanical, electronics and communication, and computer science building. The food quality is average and not hygiene. The labs are good.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing and fabulous college life but placement could be done at better.
reviews.review_text: Everything here is amazing. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, library, sports, and games with great quality. The classrooms are all smart classes. The canteen is good. It is well-connected by bus routes and train route also. The hostels were not there, and even there is no issue with the college campus. It was simply amazing.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for graduation and further studies.
reviews.review_text: It is one of the best colleges in Indore and places nearby with its best infrastructure from classrooms, library, games, etc. It even provides bus service to students. They provide hostels for the students from outside the state. IT consists of a huge building on its campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanghvi Institute of management and science, Indore.
reviews.review_text: The buildings and construction of the college and its amenities are very good. All the necessary facilities are in place. The library is vast and has all the references one would need. The laboratories and equipment are modern and are within reach of every student.

reviews.review_heading: For a place like Indore it's fine.
reviews.review_text: The college is focused only on its infrastructure compared to the education they provide in the campus. The college has a library and medical facility. The canteen on the campus serves tasty and healthy food. The labs are well-equipped and built.

faqs.answer:
A:    Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MCACandidate must have passed the qualifying examination with Mathematics at 10+2 level or at Graduation level.

reviews_list.review_title: Heartily satisfied with taking admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: A minimum of 70% of students are placed in campus placements. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top companies are IBM, TCS, and Wipro. 50 to 70% students got internships from the ECE course in TCS, like companies, Frontend Engineers, and developers, like roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are separate labs for every subject and a huge central library with a full stock of all books, including newspapers and other books, and every classroom has one projector for digital classes. There is a fully hygienic canteen and mess for the college hostel with good food. In case of emergency, they will take us to the hospital, especially. Our college provides insurance to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good for studying, it also teaches life stability.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students from our course are placed. The highest package offered is ₹2 LPA, and the lowest is ₹1.5 LPA, with the average being around ₹1.7 LPA. Top roles offered included Production and Quality Control. The companies that visited the campus were mostly small firms like Prathiraj Mental Masters. Internship opportunities were limited, with very few students receiving offers from local industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is average. Labs and classrooms are basic but functional. Library facilities are available, but students need to pay additional charges for access. The college is for day scholars only, so there are no hostel or mess facilities. Students bring their own food, and there are no major sports or medical facilities provided on campus.

review_summary.college_name: Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Nothing to say good and nothing to say bad compared to the local college.

content.Placements: I belong to the CSE batch of Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering. Around 40-60% students are placed. The highest package is about 10 LPA, and the average is 3-4 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. Roles offered are software engineer and IT support.
content.Infrastructure: The department has good labs, Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, and a decent library. Hostel rooms are adequate, the mess food is average, and the canteen offers basic meals. Medical facilities are available. Sports options are limited but functional, and they conduct sports week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College has excellent faculty and curriculum. But placements and facilities need improvement.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students from our course are placed. The highest package offered is 2 LPA, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average remained around 1.7 LPA. Top roles offered include production and quality control. Companies that visit the campus are mostly small firms like Prathiraj Mental Masters. Internship opportunities are limited, with a very few students receiving offers from local industries.
content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is average. Labs and classrooms are basic but functional. Library facilities are available, but students need to pay additional charges for access. College is for day scholars only, so there is no hostel or mess facility. Students bring their own food. There are no major sports or medical facilities provided on campus.

individual_reviews.title: Decent infrastructure, average faculty members, but strong placement opportunities.

content.Placements: The Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) department at Sri Chaitanya College of Engineering has a placement rate of around 20% to 25%. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Radiant, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and Qualcomm. Roles offered are software designer and others. While specific data on internships is not available. This college encourages students to gain practical experience through internships. The placement cell continues to work towards enhancing opportunities for students.

cut_off.college_name: Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA and MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 77059 and 127137 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 77059, 83921 and 88031, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 33716. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 41116, and the 2023 cutoff was 31935 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

reviews.review_text: Overall infrastructure is average. Labs and classrooms are basic but functional. Library facilities are available, but students need to pay additional charges for access. College is for day scholars only, so there is no hostel or mess facility. Students bring their own food. There are no major sports or medical facilities provided on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Heartily satisfied with taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text:
There are separate labs for every subject and a huge central library with a full stock of all books, including newspapers and other books, and every classroom has one projector for digital classes. There is a fully hygienic canteen and mess for the college hostel with good food. In case of emergency, they will take us to the hospital, especially. Our college 
provides insurance to students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for studying, it also teaches life stability.
reviews.review_text: Overall infrastructure is average. Labs and classrooms are basic but functional. Library facilities are available, but students need to pay additional charges for access. The college is for day scholars only, so there are no hostel or mess facilities. Students bring their own food, and there are no major sports or medical facilities provided on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, average faculty members, but strong placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college consists of so many labs mentioned in the syllabus for students. The labs are neatly maintained and the classrooms are also very well. We have sufficient library and daycare center for girls to take rest. It also has seminar halls, playground, auditorium, examination branch center, book store, canteen, etc. Hostels are also good and the food in hostel is average. The canteen food is sometimes good as every time we eat. Our college also conducts sports and has a big playground.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college to learn and experience things in a practical way.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi connection. Labs are present for every practical-related subject. Classrooms were good enough. The library is also present, consisting of numerous books written by different authors. Sports and games were conducted once a year. The canteen is present in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college, teachers, infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. They explain every problem very detailly. The labs are very good. The infrastructure of the college is very good. They encourage sports every year. They provide us with very fresh food on time. The facilities are very good in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: SCCE offers well-equipped labs, efficient classrooms, a digital library, and seminar halls. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, basic amenities, and medical care. Mess food is average. Sports include cricket, volleyball, and indoor games for recreation.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is very good. The course is divided into 8 semesters in 4 years for regular students and 6 semesters in 3 years for lateral entry students. The syllabus is allotted for the required of the course. In the final year, there are 2 projects we have to do.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SCCE (Sree Chaitanya College of Engineering) .
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure includes many things, such as classrooms and labs and Wi-Fi facilities are very secure by the respective departments. There is no hostility on the campus. But there are private hostels around the campus with well-equipped facilities. Canteens on campus are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The overall college is good and great value for money.
reviews.review_text: The facilities towards my course are good, but some changes are also needed. Labs are okay, and classrooms are very good; however, the library is not that appreciated. The hostel facility is good, and other private hostels are also available around the college. As for sports and games, there is a conducting of sports every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my course are: the WIFI availability in labs is good for working; the classrooms are neat and clean; and all types of books are available in the library. The food in the mess and canteen is average and the medical facilities are good enough because the pharmacy course is available on our campus. And the sports and games are played in the institution yearly by competition between the branches of students.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, and excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are satisfactory. Wi-Fi availability in the labs is good for working, and the classrooms are neat and clean. All types of books are available in the library. The food in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are good enough due to the pharmacy course available in our institution. Sports and games are played yearly through competitions between student branches.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in my college are good, and classrooms are very neat. The college is good. The library is there in my college, which has all departments' books. Labs are also very neat. In the hostel, food is acceptable. Sometimes the food quality is not good. The canteen is there in the college. Sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied because of the faculty, good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are: the Wi-Fi availability in the labs is good for working, the classrooms are neat and clean and all types of books are available in the library. The food in the mess and canteen is average and the medical facilities are good enough because the pharmacy course is available in our institution. Sports and games are played annually by the competition between the branches of students.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2025, and training session.

review_content.Placements: Taking lots of efforts by management to place every student of year 2025. Average CTC is up to 3 LPA. Providing training sessions for every year's students to gain real-time industry experience. Now they have started training and placement sessions for students to get industry-ready.
