reviews.review_heading: From an alumnus of institute.
reviews.review_text: Library is spacious and has access to Wi-Fi, and there are plans for a full-time digital library too. Library has access to all new reference books and all market textbooks. Each book has 5+ copies available, so there's always access for every student.

reviews.review_heading: If you are planning to take admission, read this.
reviews.review_text: The campus has good facilities including well-equipped labs, a digital library, high-speed internet, and clean classrooms. Hostel and mess facilities are decent, though there? S room for improvement in maintenance and food quality. Best seniors and good friends.

reviews.review_heading: GV Acharya gave me skills & memories. Great faculty, labs & sports fest like Energized 5 Elements!
reviews.review_text: Computer Department has good facilities. Wi-Fi-enabled campus, well-maintained labs, smart classrooms, and a library with relevant books. The hostel is decent with basic amenities. Mess food is average but hygienic. Sports ground is available, and medical help is accessible when needed.

reviews.review_heading: Do not get admission in this college; this is the worst, most wasteful college in the entire area.
reviews.review_text: The college has classrooms, but the environment is properly disturbed, and the whole interior and exterior of the college are very bad. Do not take admission in this college; this is one of the worst colleges in Mumbai University and also in the Mumbai Konkan Raigad area.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college is not the same as shown in their brochure or video advertisements. The campus lacks electricity, so please charge your phones at home before you come. The college is about a 10-minute walk from the railway station. If they tell you about the bus service, don't take it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G.V. Acharya Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi connection for students. There was a computer lab, but only for computer engineering students. Classrooms were good. The library was not good, and the librarian was not available when students were free to study after college hours. The hostel was situated very far from the college campus and the facilities were not worth the money. The food served was oily.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college because of the management.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. This college is on the outskirts so there is little to no cellular network. If you want to take a printout you literally have to walk for like 20 minutes outside the college. Overall the building is decent but it is quite far the campus. I would rate the college with 2 stars.

reviews.review_heading: Don't ever think of joining G.V. Acharya Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is renovated every year. In summer, it is even worse. The washrooms are not clean. The Xerox center always has issues with machines. The hostel life is even worse. They don't provide good food. They only look for money, and they charge you for the whole year even if you don't want to continue to stay in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and placements. Infrastructure is too good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are awesome, and our infrastructure is almost new. Classrooms are huge as compared to other colleges. The entire campus is enabled with high-speed Wi-Fi. For civil course, we have software labs, and it has almost all software, and computers are too fast. All books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good to all teaching & understanding students concept as well as they solve them.
reviews.review_text: The facilities is good most of events organised, sports, outdoor activities & games, robotics simulation available in the campus. The quality of lab is better or good & also our classroom are neat & clean. All types of food available in our cantin. I'm day scholar students that's why I don't know hostel rooms. No infrastructure related issue during our tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: G. V. Acharya institute have great campus with best education for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of G. V. Acharya Institute is great. They provide the best facilities to their students like library, experiment lab, and sports area, etc. This institute has the best classrooms with proper ventilation. They have proper security in their institute. The campus is huge. Also, they provide hostel facilities for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, good infrastructure, & decent placements provide a balanced learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure. There are 8 labs for computer engineering students. A canteen is also available, and they provide hostel facilities for students. Sports, cultural events, and other activities are held in the college. We all enjoy and celebrate all functions and festivals in college. It is the best college I have ever seen.

faqs.answer: SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

faqs.answer:
SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

hostel_campus.college_name: SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Coaching by professional teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are individual laboratories for each department. Depending on student strength, all necessities are arranged in the laboratories. Food is available at all times in the college canteen. Our teachers also encourage us to concentrate on sports.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top engineering colleges in Tiruvannamalai.
reviews.review_text: A large number of lab technicians and teachers work in our college. Nearly 1,000+ students graduate from our college every year. We are required to wear formal dress within the college, and they check our dress codes, shoes, and ID cards daily. They collect fines when students don't wear their ID cards.

reviews.review_heading: SKP Engineering College is absolutely a good engineering college in Tamilnadu.
reviews.review_text: SKP Engineering College has good laboratories and well-equipped library facilities. This college has more computer laboratories. This college hostel's facilities were very good. The hostel food is very hygienic. This college has good sports grounds and coaching staff facilities. Emergency medical facilities are also here in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Probably one of the best options
reviews.review_text: According to our convenience, we may pay our tuition fees on time. We can pay our fees through both online and offline facilities. Also, medical camps were conducted once a year for regular medical check-ups. The most comfortable environment with all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: CSE at SKP Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Delicious foods with different menus to be followed by canteen contractors on every single day. Usually, they charge for foods and transportation along with the tuition fees. Book fees are also charged along with the due/records fees. Also, placement fees should be charged separately.

reviews.review_heading: SKP Engineering College is really a good college.
reviews.review_text: SKP Engineering College has excellent laboratory facilities. There are many departments, well-equipped classrooms, and a good library. The hostel facilities are also commendable, with emergency medical facilities available. The taste of hostel food is good, and sports grounds with coaching staff are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and quality education.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for all departments include free Wi-Fi, lab facilities, classrooms, and water tanks on every floor. S. K. P Engineering College offers excellent sports facilities and a well-maintained mess with attentive staff who clean the tables and floors daily.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel fee is less compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: I feel lucky to be a part of SKPEC college.
reviews.review_text: There is the best infrastructure in the entire Tiruvannamalai district. Our college infrastructure, labs, campus and greenery maintenance, are always the best. Our college is still constructing many more things for better infrastructure. The food is provided for free of cost for every student. The quality of the food served is just like homemade food. Anyone from outside can enter into the mess any time and taste the food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college were the best. In our campus, we had good and spacious labs. There was a separate building for library Wi-Fi was also available on campus. Classrooms were the best with good space, and we also had a huge hall. Facilities provided in the hostel were of good quality.  Hot water was provided in rooms. We also had medical facilities. The food served was of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SKP Engineering College (SKPEC).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with a good environment. Most of the time, we used to sit under the tree for exam preparation. There is no restriction for students to sit anywhere. Food in our canteen is good, and for the mechanical branch, there is a separate block with all labs and machines.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure, but there were no placements for 2013 batch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and we get a feeling like we are in the forest. There is a library for namesake, and we can't be able to use that. In labs, very old equipment is used. Classrooms are cleaned and maintained clearly. But the usage of mobile phones is banned on our campus, so they didn't provide Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: The review of SKP Engineering College (SKPEC).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our classrooms are nice and are decently maintained. You can get purified drinking water here. The college has nice labs, and even the transportation facilities provided here are really good. The hostel facilities are really good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied as I didn't get placements. But, the college was good in all the other aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good enough. The college provides 24 hours Wi-Fi facility. The labs are equipped with all the required tools. Classrooms are neat and clean. Our library had all the necessary books, and all kinds of sports equipment are available here. There is a gym available here, and it has all the required equipment.

reviews.review_heading: This is a basic platform of your life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is big, and classrooms are sophisticated to all students. The library has both old regulation and the current regulation books. The whole campus is enabled with free Wi-Fi. The laboratory is big, and the equipment in it is updated. We have sports and games on the campus. Sports like football, volleyball, chess, basketball, and carrom board have a good scope in our college.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall college experience is good.

review_content.Placements: The placements offered by the college are average, with companies like HDFC, Infosys, and HCL hiring through campus drives. The average package offered is 2.2 LPA. In my class, only two students got placed in HDFC and HCL. The college does not provide any internships, and if they do, it is without any stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is surrounded by lush greenery, and Wi-Fi is available in both the laboratory and hostel. The library is well-stocked, and the infrastructure is satisfactory. Hostel rooms are shared, and the food quality is average. There are two canteens available, both of which serve good food. Every Sunday, students organize a sports match where cricket and badminton are played.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It should provide good placements and knowledgeable teachers.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the colleges, and the placements we get are not worth it. The salary package offered is under 1 lac or close to it. The average student who scores around 80% will not get any placements. Students who score above 90% in academics will get the placements but not much good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available in the computer department, but the network speed is too slow, which makes even searching for something hard. Classrooms are decent. There are not lots of books to read in the library, and the present books are just about study specifics and nothing else than that.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided like scholarships.

review_content.Placements: This college does not offers placement so we need to get placed by walk in campus but nowadays some companies around 2 to 4 small companies are coming in college for recruitment last year 10 students where placed through collegr campus the highest package was 10lpa and the lowest was 2.5LPA, the average is 3.25lpa .
review_content.Infrastructure: In my course there is a good working computer labs with high internet speed and software the staff is helping and supportive, the quality of food available in mess and canteen is average, library is very good we get many books from library for extra studies.

Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Dattakala Group of Institution Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. The college celebrates Indian festivals.
reviews.review_text: My hostel is good; the hostel area is very clean and has a fresh nature. The facilities provided by the hostel include Wi-Fi, hot water, and cultural programs. The hostel has two rectors and 24-hour watchman service. The hostel rules are very strict.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2022 and really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure in our course is good. 
The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good and the mess, canteen, medical facilities, and sports are good.
I also hope you can take admission in this college because its facilities are excellent .

reviews.review_heading: Overall college experience is good.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is surrounded by lush greenery, and Wi-Fi is available in both the laboratory and hostel. The library is well-stocked, and the infrastructure is satisfactory. Hostel rooms are shared, and the food quality is average. There are two canteens available, both of which serve good food. Every Sunday, students organize a sports match where cricket and badminton are played.

reviews.review_heading: It should provide good placements and knowledgeable teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in the computer department, but the network speed is too slow, which makes even searching for something hard. Classrooms are decent. There are not lots of books to read in the library, and the present books are just about study specifics and nothing else than that.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided like scholarships.
reviews.review_text: In my course there is a good working computer labs with high internet speed and software the staff is helping and supportive, the quality of food available in mess and canteen is average, library is very good we get many books from library for extra studies.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are clean. This college does not provide a good Wi-Fi facility. The library is peaceful. Our hostel is not good, so students prefer to reside in a rented apartment.

review_content.Placements: Till now, 26 students are placed in our batch. HCL visited on campus drive in which 14 students get selected and the rest of them are placed through off campus drive by the link provided by our college placement cell. Overall, placements are not so good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good to pursue B.Tech, and the placements of the previous year are good.

content.Placements: The placements are average. The average package offered in the recent years is 3-3.50 LPA. The mass recruiters are Accenture, Infosys and Zed etc. Some students are offered a high package of 10-12 LPA. The students are offered a package of 15-20 LPA when they get placed outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There is a big canteen which serves good food at a low price. There is an air-conditioned library, and all the laboratories are well-equipped. The classrooms are good, but they are not air-conditioned. The seats and tables are also very comfortable. The campus area is sufficient. The college doesn't have any boys' hostel. There is a girls' hostel available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: BPRCE college review and experience.

content.Placements: During the time we passed out, there was no placement happening. Not a single company visited my college and the placement rate is zero. In my full batch, out of 60 students, 5 or six students only got a job by searching individually. If someone is looking for this college, my suggestion is not to visit. These days in the whole college, the maximum student strength is 50 to 60 only.
content.Infrastructure: In the case of infrastructure, we can say that it is good. We have computer labs, mechanical labs, electronics labs, civil labs and electrical labs also. In the college, we have a playground also for volleyball, football, badminton, etc.

content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are ventilated as well as clean. There is one common library for all the branches. One canteen is also there to eat. There is no proper ground or sports facility in our college till now. Still students manages to play cricket, volleyball, basketball in the small ground besides our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good to pursue B.Tech, and the placements of the previous year are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There is a big canteen which serves good food at a low price. There is an air-conditioned library, and all the laboratories are well-equipped. The classrooms are good, but they are not air-conditioned. The seats and tables are also very comfortable. The campus area is sufficient. The college doesn't have any boys' hostel. There is a girls' hostel available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: BPRCE college review and experience.
reviews.review_text: In the case of infrastructure, we can say that it is good. We have computer labs, mechanical labs, electronics labs, civil labs and electrical labs also. In the college, we have a playground also for volleyball, football, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is average, faculty is good but the placement is below average.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are ventilated as well as clean. There is one common library for all the branches. One canteen is also there to eat. There is no proper ground or sports facility in our college till now. Still students manages to play cricket, volleyball, basketball in the small ground besides our college.

The college is really nice and the teachers are friendly, helpful as well as good mentors. The college infrastructure is not that good. There are no nearby hangout points except Murthal. 
The college canteen has been renovated with some good delicacies. Placement cell is good and it even conducts pool campus placements. The main thing is standing out from the crowd and giving all your efforts to the course to get what you want. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gurukul Vidyapeeth Institute of Engineering and Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Gurukul Vidyapeeth Institute of Engineering and Technology offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Gurukul Vidyapeeth Institute of Engineering and Technology courses range between INR 1,27,000 to 3,10,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Gurukul Vidyapeeth Institute of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for MBA/PGDM, M.Sc, After 10th Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, BBA, B.Sc, BCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Gurukul Vidyapeeth Institute of Engineering and Technology are Aeronautical Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Marine Engineering, Petroleum Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Structural Engineering, Information Technology.

review_summary.college_name: Gurukul Vidyapeeth Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: No practical knowledge is provided by the college, you have to put your own effort.

content.Placements: Only 7 students are placed in our course out of 60 with a salary package of 3 LPA in private software companies and in DRDO as interns. Above 60% of students got internships in our college. Technical roles are offered but only theoretical knowledge is available. You can interact with your teachers to get some extra practical knowledge so they will help you.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a huge library are available to read the books. Hostel facility is good and mess food is also good, especially the food served for lunch was tasty. Many games are there to play. A football ground and a basketball ground are also there in our college. The holy places are available like a temple, gurudwara, church, and mosque. There is also a yoga section.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am not truly satisfied with the facilities, teaching and other things provided here.

content.Placements: The placement record of this college is not good enough. The students who got placed are very minimum this year, around 4-5. The companies visited for placements are Net2Source, Optimus Solutions, etc. Students have to fulfil the requirements of companies to attend the interviews. There is a placement cell in the college for managing the placements, and they are good with students, and they make efforts to bring companies to our campus for placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not that good. It has less number of buildings, but it fulfils the basic requirements of students. The college has libraries, 2 computer labs and one open ground for sports. There are no medical facilities available. The mess of college is a big disappointment for students because the food quality is poor. I did not face any big issues related to infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Totally, this is the worst place to select.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all. Our college seniors have done some misbehaviour so that our college got banned from placement from major companies. This is blacklisted from HAL and DRDO. I haven't seen any recruiters coming, and except two seniors nobody got placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good on the campus, but now this institute is totally closed because of some loan problems. So, don't get cheated by somebody. As our college got tied up with a nearby college named SVIET, so don't take admission in this particular branch as they will cheat you by transferring you to their mechanical department after a year or so. The food provided over here is the worst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The worst college of this world.

content.Placements: There are no placements even the 3rd-grade companies also doesn't come to this college. They are only fooling people. There are no proper facilities provided. They don't even have Training and Placement cell. The worst place that any student can imagine. They torture students and their parents in terms of money and study
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is pathetic. We do not have labs, canteen, classrooms, benches, machines, and proper hostel facilities are also not provided. Boys hostel is in one block present on campus, and the girls hostel is on top of the administration block.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college that lies to the students for admissions.

content.Placements: My senior batch got a maximum package of 3 LPA, last year from computer science branch. At present, my college got adopted by Swami Vivekananda Institute, and because of this adoption process, they only gave a chance to 50 students from all branches.
content.Infrastructure: The labs of my college are closed most of the time because the machines, tools do not work properly. Wi-Fi facilities are only provided to hostlers in my 1st-year. The hostel rooms are very cheap compared to the to the fee structure, and in the canteen, there are no varieties of food for eating.

reviews.review_heading: No practical knowledge is provided by the college, you have to put your own effort.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a huge library are available to read the books. Hostel facility is good and mess food is also good, especially the food served for lunch was tasty. Many games are there to play. A football ground and a basketball ground are also there in our college. The holy places are available like a temple, gurudwara, church, and mosque. There is also a yoga section.

reviews.review_heading: I am not truly satisfied with the facilities, teaching and other things provided here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not that good. It has less number of buildings, but it fulfils the basic requirements of students. The college has libraries, 2 computer labs and one open ground for sports. There are no medical facilities available. The mess of college is a big disappointment for students because the food quality is poor. I did not face any big issues related to infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Totally, this is the worst place to select.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good on the campus, but now this institute is totally closed because of some loan problems. So, don't get cheated by somebody. As our college got tied up with a nearby college named SVIET, so don't take admission in this particular branch as they will cheat you by transferring you to their mechanical department after a year or so. The food provided over here is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college of this world.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pathetic. We do not have labs, canteen, classrooms, benches, machines, and proper hostel facilities are also not provided. Boys hostel is in one block present on campus, and the girls hostel is on top of the administration block.

reviews.review_heading: The college that lies to the students for admissions.
reviews.review_text: The labs of my college are closed most of the time because the machines, tools do not work properly. Wi-Fi facilities are only provided to hostlers in my 1st-year. The hostel rooms are very cheap compared to the to the fee structure, and in the canteen, there are no varieties of food for eating.

reviews.review_heading: Better drop a year than this college.
reviews.review_text:
Complete waste of time and money! Classrooms have broken benches from the 90s. Even the switch boards are broken to such extent.
There is no Wi-Fi available. The library doesn't have a single book related to the aero curriculum. Sports facilities are worse than a government school, only a basketball court is available where you can play if you bring your own ball. 
No other sports facility is available there is not even a qualified sports teacher. Labs are like layman workshops. The chemistry la...

faqs.answer: No, Shri Khushal Das University is not expensive.SKDU fees range from Rs 15,000 to Rs 1,50,000 per year, depending on the degree level, duration and specialisation of the course. The college offers 156 courses at Certificate, UG, Ph.D, Diploma and PG programmes. Furthermore, SKDU offers 13 courses in BSc, 6 courses in BA at the UG level. At the PG level, the students can choose a wide range of specializations - 21 courses in MA, 15 course in MSc. Admission to SKDU courses are open for the academic year 2024-25. For admission the college conducts CBSE 12th. In addition to this, scores of RBSE 12th are accepted by SKDU.

review_summary.college_name: SKD University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medical and Lab Technology (BMLT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Balanced BMLT program, with decent infrastructure but mixed reviews on faculty members and placement

content.Placements: Around 60 students got placed. The salary package ranges between 2.5 LPA- 5 LPA. Students are placed at hospitals such as Max Healthcare, Fortis Healthcare, Apollo Hospital, and Metro Hospital. Meanwhile, in diagnostic centers such as Dr. Lal PathLabs, SRL Diagnostics, and Thyrocare. Students also have opportunities in research and development, with pharmaceutical companies and technological industries. Other sectors for placements include private clinics, nursing homes, and blood banks. All students secured internships in many hospitals. Because that's the paramedical line of Shri Khushal Das (SKD) University in Hanumangarh. The college has strong ties with the leading hospitals, diagnostic labs, and corporations for internships and placements. Popular recruiters include Fortis, Apollo, and SRL Diagnostics for healthcare students. Special features are internship programs are integrated into many courses, providing practical exposure and boosting job readiness.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A good college for students who dream and dreams become true here.

content.Placements: The placement of Shri Khushal Das University is too good every year; 2 or 3 drives are organized here. Students who pass out graduation within year are eligible to drive the drives organized by banks for deputy manager or assistant managers. The university has ties with many banks, e.g., ICICI Bank & Axis Bank.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very beautiful; it is placed between ends of farmers; it is a very peaceful palace campus; it is a very environment-friendly campus area; it is very clean; students have been very helpful in keeping the campus clean. The library provides all the books to students as needed. Many hi-tech labs are on campus.

content.Infrastructure: On the college campus, there are 8 buildings, which are different for every department and on the college campus, there are 2 cricket fields, 1 football ball ground, 1 basketball ground and 1 volleyball field. individual_reviews.title: Review of Shri Khushal Das University.

content.Placements: Students got placed in top companies such as Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro, etc. Almost 90% of students got placed in our college. From the third year, our college trained us for placements by conducting CRT programs. So it was very useful. Students got high salary packages.

All rooms are spacious and air-conditioned. The hostel provides large lockers for huge backpacks. It provides free wireless internet.

admission_process.title: SKD University Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Khushal Das University admission is merit-based.SKD Universitygives different courses at the UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral levels. These are given in different streams such asManagement,Agriculture,Engineering and Technology,etc. Read below for more details on SKDU admissions:-
It is important to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission in SKDU. Check out the SKD University course eligibility and selection criteria in the information here:
Make your course selection here, to check out the other SKD University courses eligibility and selection criteria.

The total fees for SKD University courses are inclusive of different components such as tuition fees, admission fees, caution deposits, etc. Interested candidates can check out the given information for theSKD University course fee and seats:

SKD University admission process is a multi-step process that begins with the release of application forms on the University's official website. Candidates willing to apply must meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course and then fill out the application form. The complete SKD University admission process is given here:
1: Application Process
The application forms are given online on the official website of the university.Students must fill out the form and pay the application fees before the last date.
2: Selection Rounds
SKD University shortlists candidates based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.
3: Final Admission
Selected students must pay the tuition fees to confirm admission.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at Shri Khushal Das University?
faqs.answer: Greetings!Shri Khushal Das University admissionto all courses is merit-based. Interested candidates need to meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course and follow the steps to apply for admission at SKD University. The University releases its application form online on its official website. faqs.question: Does SKD University offer better placements than Indira Gandhi University?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU) does not offer campus placements. However, IGNOU BCA graduates have a placement rate of over 60%, with an average package of INR 2.5 LPA. SKD University, also known as Shri Khushal Das University, has a good placement record. The university has over 600 recruitment partners, and most students find jobs at leading companies. In 2022, almost 90% of CSE students were placed in companies like Wipro and Accenture. According to Shiksha, the average salary package offered at SKD University is around 4 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities after pursuing an MBA at SKDU?
faqs.answer: After finishing an MBA from SKD University, there are numerous career choices in Business Administration. reviews.review_heading: Balanced BMLT program, with decent infrastructure but mixed reviews on faculty members and placement
reviews.review_text: Shri Khushal Das (SKD) University in Hanumangarh offers separate hostel facilities for boys and girls with varying room arrangements to accommodate single or multiple students. Hostels are equipped with basic amenities such as beds, study tables, almirahs, fans, and separate washrooms to maintain hygiene. Rooms are cleaned daily by hostel staff, and the campus provides free Wi-Fi to aid students in their studies.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for students who dream and dreams become true here.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very beautiful; it is placed between ends of farmers; it is a very peaceful palace campus; it is a very environment-friendly campus area; it is very clean; students have been very helpful in keeping the campus clean. The library provides all the books to students as needed. Many hi-tech labs are on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Khushal Das University.
reviews.review_text: On the college campus, there are 8 buildings, which are different for every department and on the college campus, there are 2 cricket fields, 1 football ball ground,  1 basketball ground and 1 volleyball field. In other words, there was a college canteen. Canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied 1.
reviews.review_text: they are trying to make their infrastructure good. they only focus on increasing strengths of their students in the university. their goals is to promote only admissions not the intellectual development of students hence .

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Khushal Das University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has a very peaceful environment. Its staff members are very friendly and helpful. They have local knowledge. All facilities are clean. All rooms are spacious and air-conditioned. The hostel provides large lockers for huge backpacks. It provides free wireless internet.

reviews.review_heading: Overall doing any course in this college is a good experience.
reviews.review_text: College hostel provides one, two, three, four, and six bedded rooms with AC and without AC. Each student is given one B.Ed one table, and a cupboard. There is a laundry service every week for your clothes. The mess provides various types of meals on the menu, there are three types of mess Veg, Non-Veg, and Special. You get meal 4 times a day in a mess. Registration for hostels is first to come to the first basis on the website Vtop. No, you cant have a rented room or PG.

reviews.review_heading: I have joined Shri Khushal Das University to succeed.
reviews.review_text: There are all types of facilities in our department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, smart classrooms, parks, canteen and medical facilities. All types of sports and games are conducted at regular intervals. The quality of all these facilities is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent faculty and better placements in 2018. I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our institute is good. The college provides free Wi-Fi facility and about 5 classrooms in our course. There is a well-maintained library with about 2,000 books. Hostel rooms are neat and clean. The food served in the mess is very good and hygienic. Medical facilities are available, and the doctor is also available. There is a huge playground where games like football, cricket and kabaddi are played.

reviews.review_heading: This university is the best. The environment and study are top-notch.
reviews.review_text: This is the best university. The university environment is good. Students come here to study and grow. Boys and girls study together. The campus has Wi-Fi facilities. The library, classrooms, and basic needs are available. Overall, this place is nice for learning and spending student life.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are available in my college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available. The facilities in my hostel were of the best quality, and high-quality food was available in the mess and canteen. The medical facilities were also available in my college. All types of sports and games were available in my college. All the best facilities were available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, good placements in 2019, and really good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities like sports, canteen, and sports grounds. Many programs are organised in our college. The food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are available and are good.

college_info.college_name: SKD University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: SKDU BSc fee structure comprises tuition fees, admission fees, and miscellaneous one-time charges. One-time charges and the admission fee are to be paid only once, at the time of admission. The tuition fee must be paid semester-wise. The tuition fee for the BSc under SKD University is INR 2.6 lakh.
NOTE: The fee is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence is indicative.
No, Shri Khushal Das University is not expensive.

SKDU fees range from Rs 15,000 to Rs 1,50,000 per year, depending on the degree level, duration and specialisation of the course. The college offers 156 courses at Certificate, UG, Ph.D, Diploma and PG programmes. Furthermore, SKDU offers 13 courses in BSc, 6 courses in BA at the UG level. At the PG level, the students can choose a wide range of specializations - 21 courses in MA, 15 course in MSc. Admission to SKDU courses are open for the academic year 2024-25. For admission the college conducts CBSE 12th. In addition to this, scores of RBSE 12th are accepted by SKDU.

No, Shri Khushal Das University does not offer a 100% scholarship. The university in collaboration with PIE- Patrika In Education conducts inspire award scholarship exam for the students.Below mentioned students can apply for the scholarship exam-Category 1- 10th class studentsCategory 2- 11th and 12th class studentsCategory 3- UG StudentsCategory 4-PG Students
Apart from this, the university also provides various scholarships to its SC/ST and girls students.

review_content.Placements: Minimum students have been placed in our college but in the pandemic, the students are not selected in the drives in the placement section and they completed only degrees. reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college and headed by a good university.

review_summary.college_name: Vaishno College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2015, and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 100% placements are offered. The maximum package I heard of is 2.4 lakh per year. The last company to come for placement is Future Finder, and they hired 2 students of the final year. One is from the company science and engineering branch and the second is from the electrical branch.
content.Infrastructure: The library and labs are good. The library is open till 4 pm, which is the closing time of the college. Classrooms are also good. Food is also okay; medical facilities and sports are also provided. And college vehicles are there for any medical emergency.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Wipro, HCL, HTC, etc. Almost 30% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: It was an excellent college. Hostel was better. The infrastructure was great. There was a huge library on our campus. Laboratoreies were better. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Sports were conducted. There was a huge playground in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and all facilities are available in our college.

content.Placements: Minimum students have been placed in our college but in the pandemic, the students are not selected in the drives in the placement section and they completed only degrees. Now, this semester, the college gives a derived name as Pentagon. I will join and I will complete my training at that institute and after training, I will be placed. Maximum students are placed in college but mostly go into government jobs.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the campus, hostel, and teaching experience are good. The canteen is not good. Wi-Fi is available in labs and the classrooms are good. Grounds are also available to play cricket. College buses are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and headed by a good university.

content.Placements: From our course, about 2 to 3 students got placed. From our batch, around 10 to 15 students got placed with the highest salary package of around 3 LPA. Companies like CINIF Technologies and Bodha Tree Pvt Ltd visited our college to offer placements for our batch. Almost every student got an internship in companies like Shiv Shakti Pvt Ltd in Nagalpur, etc. I got placed as a trainee in the company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good, and the hostels were provided separately for both boys and girls with good rooms. 2 students are allotted to every room in the hostel. Our classrooms were also good and had a sitting capacity of 50 students. Facilities provided to us were very good like a parking facility, Wi-Fi, neat and clean washrooms, but the food served in the mess was very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Vaishno College of Engineering has a very good campus.

content.Placements: About 10-20 students from our batch got placed. The highest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA, and I didn't remember about the lowest salary package offered to the students. Top survey companies visit our college to recruit us. Many of them did an internship in companies like Volkswagen India and Bajaj Motors. Roles like machine developer, etc., are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and it was spacious. Our college provides good parking facility. The canteen is available in our college. Our college provides very good facilities. The library was also available. Wi-Fi facility is available here, but classrooms were little small. The hostel facility was good, and it was huge, with about 500 rooms. Food served in the mess was not good.
